annotations.note: Dense comparison-heavy review (Cyberpunk/Bioshock/Obsidian named in-text, not an outside guess). The Neon-nightclub-vs-scope passage was left unlabeled as a hedge/justification rather than a clean charge. The 'freedom to X, Y, Z, W' list was split into four independently-claimed capabilities (exploration, replayability, romance-candidate, build_variety) sharing one span — a judgment call worth checking; 'originality' is a free-form candidate, no pinned home fits a copied-formula charge.
